args:
Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Core API Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/hono-base.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/client/client.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Core API Read/Write Ledger

## src/index.ts
- Public surface: Exports Hono class and types (Env, Handler, Context, HonoRequest, client types)
- Internal names noticed: Hono import from ./hono, re-exports from ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
- Plain-English summary: Entry point module that re-exports Hono framework class and related types for public consumption
- Copy-safe detail: Module declares @module tag, exports Hono class, re-exports 10+ type definitions including Env, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, NotFoundHandler, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions

## src/types.ts
- Public surface: Defines Env, Variables, RouterRoute, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, TypedResponse, Schema, Input, ValidationTargets
- Internal names noticed: BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankInput, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, ToSchema, MergePath, AddParam, ExtractParams, MergeSchemaPath
- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions module for Hono handlers, routes, schemas, and validation targets
- Copy-safe detail: File contains HandlerInterface with 11 method signatures (app.get variants with 1-10 handlers), MiddlewareHandlerInterface with 11 method signatures, OnHandlerInterface with 11 method signatures, plus ToSchema output type, TypedResponse, ValidationTargets, and path parameter extraction types

## src/hono.ts
- Public surface: Hono class extending HonoBase with SmartRouter default, exposes get/post/put/delete/patch/all/on/use methods
- Internal names noticed: BlankEnv, BlankSchema, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoBase, SmartRouter constructor with routers array
- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Main Hono framework class that extends HonoBase, configures routing via SmartRouter, and exposes handler registration methods
- Copy-safe detail: Class constructor accepts HonoOptions with optional router configuration, defaults to SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter, exposes standard HTTP method handlers and middleware registration

## src/hono-base.ts
- Public surface: Router access, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, route, fetch, request, fire methods
- Internal names noticed: compose import, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HonoOptions, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, _basePath, #path, routes array, #clone, #notFoundHandler, #dispatch, #handleError
- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url, ./http-exception, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/mime
- Plain-English summary: Base implementation of Hono with routing setup, error handling, and request dispatch logic using middleware composition
- Copy-safe detail: Implements standard HTTP methods via dynamic property assignment, supports middleware chain composition via compose, includes mount for other frameworks, route for nesting Hono apps, and request helper for testing

## src/context.ts
- Public surface: Context class with req, env, set, get, var, header, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound, event, executionCtx, res
- Internal names noticed: ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, DefaultRenderer, Renderer, FetchEventLike, ExecutionContext, GET_MATCH_RESULT, HonoRequest, StatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, TextRespond, JSONRespond, BodyRespond, HTMLRespond, ResponseInit, ResponseOrInit, #rawRequest, #req, #var, #status, #executionCtx, #res, #layout, #renderer, #notFoundHandler, #preparedHeaders, #matchResult, #path, #newResponse
- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./http-exception, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers
- Plain-English summary: Request execution context object providing middleware access to request details, response building, and data storage via set/get
- Copy-safe detail: Context wraps raw Request, provides typed response builders (text/json/html/body/redirect), manages environment bindings via env, stores variables via Map-backed set/get, tracks response state with finalized flag, and exposes execution context for FetchEvent/Service Worker

## src/request.ts
- Public surface: HonoRequest class with param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath
- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, H, Result, Input, ValidationTargets, ContentfulStatusCode, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, Body, BodyCache, OptionalRequestInitProperties, RequiredRequestInit, cloneRawRequest, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode
- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/url
- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper object providing typed access to URL parameters, query strings, headers, and body parsing with caching support
- Copy-safe detail: HonoRequest wraps raw Request, extracts path parameters via regex match, parses query strings and headers, caches body reads to avoid double-consumption, implements cloneRawRequest for forwarding requests after validation

## src/request/constants.ts
- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol export
- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
- Imports or neighbors: none
- Plain-English summary: Module exports a unique symbol for accessing internal request match result in a non-enumerable way
- Copy-safe detail: Single symbol export used by HonoRequest to expose #matchResult private field without TypeScript's # prefix enforcement at runtime

## src/utils/body.ts
- Public surface: parseBody function with all and dot options
- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, ParseBodyOptions, ParseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
- Imports or neighbors: ../request, ../utils/body
- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utility for form data with support for array values and dot-notation nested object parsing
- Copy-safe detail: parseBody handles multipart/form-data and application/x-www-form-urlencoded content types, converts FormData to body object with configurable array and nested parsing via all and dot options, includes XSS protection via __proto__ key filtering

## src/compose.ts
- Public surface: compose function for middleware composition
- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Error, dispatch
- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition function based on koa-compose pattern, chains handlers with proper next() propagation and error handling
- Copy-safe detail: compose takes array of [handler, route] tuples, maintains index to prevent multiple next() calls, captures errors for ErrorHandler, calls onNotFound when appropriate, sets context.res on final response

## src/http-exception.ts
- Public surface: HTTPException class extending Error with res and status properties
- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions, Response, getResponse
- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
- Plain-English summary: Exception class for throwing controlled HTTP errors with optional response object and custom messages
- Copy-safe detail: HTTPException accepts status code (defaults to 500) and options including response object, message, and cause, getResponse method creates Response from stored res or generates new one with message and status

## src/client/index.ts
- Public surface: hc function, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
- Internal names noticed: BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, Client, ClientRequestOptions, UnionToIntersection, Hono, FormValue, ValidationTargets, serialize, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol
- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./utils/cookie, ./types, ../hono, ../router, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types
- Plain-English summary: HTTP client module with typed request builder (hc) and response parsing utilities for making requests to Hono APIs
- Copy-safe detail: hc creates typed client proxies via Proxy, supports $get/$post method syntax with path parameters and query strings, parseResponse infers response types and throws DetailedError on non-2xx status, includes WebSocket support via $ws

## src/client/client.ts
- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class with fetch method
- Internal names noticed: Hono, FormValue, ValidationTargets, BuildSearchParamsFn, Client, ClientRequestOptions, UnionToIntersection, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, ExpandAllMethod, StandardMethods, ClientRequest, ClientResponseOfEndpoint, ClientResponse, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, TypedURL, BuildSearch, IsEmptyObject, IsLiteral, ApplyParam
- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ./utils, ../utils/cookie, ../utils/types
- Plain-English summary: Client implementation providing proxy-based API client with typed endpoints via PathToChain and url parameter building
- Copy-safe detail: createProxy builds proxy object that captures call path, ClientRequestImpl constructs URL with params/queries and serializes body based on method, supports form/json/ws requests, handles $url and $path for previewing constructed URLs before fetching

## src/client/types.ts
- Public surface: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, PickResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse
- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, HasRequiredKeys, BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ExpandAllMethod, StandardMethods, ClientRequest, ClientResponseOfEndpoint, ClientResponse, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, TypedURL, IsEmptyObject, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, PickRoute, PickSchema, GlobalResponseDefinition, Callback, ObjectType
- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ./utils, ./types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types
- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for HTTP client including endpoint schemas, response types, and inference utilities
- Copy-safe detail: ClientRequest defines endpoint methods via keyof ExpandAllMethod<S>, ClientResponse includes body/ok/status/redirect/headers/url plus typed json/text methods, InferResponseType<T> extracts output type from endpoint, InferRequestType<T> extracts input type, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode filters by status code

## src/client/utils.ts
- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
- Internal names noticed: ClientErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, fetchRP, DetailedError, ClientResponse, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ObjectType, jsonRegex, detectResponseType, nullBodyResponses
- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Utility functions for URL construction, search parameter building, and response parsing with type inference
- Copy-safe detail: mergePath normalizes base and path separators, replaceUrlParam substitutes named params in URL, buildSearchParams constructs URLSearchParams from query object, deepMerge recursively merges objects, parseResponse wraps fetchRP with type-safe inference

## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError class
- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, Response, _data, _bodyInit, DetailedError, content-type, jsonRegex, detectResponseType
- Imports or neighbors: none
- Plain-English summary: Minimal fetch utility that returns parsed response data, throws DetailedError on non-2xx status
- Copy-safe detail: fetchRP accepts Response or Promise<Response>, detects content-type (json vs text) via regex matching, throws DetailedError with status and detail on non-ok status, returns _data from polyfill or parsed body, nullBodyResponses excludes 101/204/205/304 from body check

## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
- Public surface: fire function, handle export
- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema, HandleOptions, FetchEvent, addEventListener
- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ./types, ./handler
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter that registers Hono app with addEventListener('fetch') for browser/worker environments
- Copy-safe detail: fire function adds fetch event listener using handle(app, options), @ts-expect-error comment for TypeScript's addEventListener typing gap, options may include custom fetch implementation

## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
- Public surface: handle function
- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema, FetchEvent, HandleOptions, fetch, globalThis
- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ./types, ../types
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker fetch handler that calls app.fetch and falls back to custom fetch on 404
- Copy-safe detail: handle returns function that takes FetchEvent, calls evt.respondWith with promise, passes event to app.fetch (expecting ExecutionContext), falls back to opts.fetch on 404 status, binds globalThis.fetch for correct Service Worker context

## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
- Public surface: FetchEvent interface extending ExtendableEvent
- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, Event, clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId, respondWith
- Imports or neighbors: none
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker FetchEvent interface definition for type safety in adapter
- Copy-safe detail: FetchEvent extends Event with waitUntil, adds clientId/handled/preloadResponse/resultingClientId properties from Service Worker spec, includes respondWith method for claiming response
